subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto those who have soared in the atmosphere of love and recognition until they attained the station wherein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا للذین طاروا فی هوآء المحبه و العرفان الی ان بلغوا المقام الذی
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
